Empirical Contrast: L1 (Mega-fire) vs L2 (Extreme Wildfire Event)

This report contrasts two XGBoost models trained on the 2012-2018 dataset to identify predictors of fire area (L1) vs fire intensity (L2).

1. Dataset & Metrics (2012-2018)

ModelPositives / TotalROC-AUCPR-AUCFaithfulness (Bhatt)Faithfulness (Alvarez)
Model L1 (Area ≥ 1000ha)76 / 305110.91100.11070.4220-0.6232
Model L2 (EWE FLI ≥ 10000kW/m)11 / 305110.76960.00460.3700-0.5665

Note: ROC-AUC / PR-AUC are out-of-fold (stratified 5-fold CV), not in-sample. Faithfulness metrics evaluated on a representative subset of 500 instances using 'mean' as perturbation baseline.
